equipmentMods.amulet: For every 30 points of your highest stat, gain 1% Damage bonus.
equipmentMods.belt: Death Blade: Extend the duration Death Blade stays on the field by 2 seconds.
equipmentMods.goblet: Arcane Apocalypse: Increase explosion size by 30%. When an explosion hits, 25% chance to gain 2% Arcane damage buff, stacks up to 75.
equipmentMods.horn: Arcane Apocalypse: Arcane Apocalypse gains a 50% chance to explode a second time, and a 25% to explode a third time.
equipmentMods.relic: Gain an 8% chance to spawn Mecha Golems, dealing Fire Damage infront of them for 6 seconds. Mecha Golems benefit from your Fire Damage bonus
equipmentMods.trinket: Death Blade: When Death Blade despawns, it will summon an arcane spike on a nearby enemy, dealing 100% damage + 20% additional damage for every second the blade was on the field.
equipmentMods.boots: Gain 1% maximum Health per potion slot

equipmentMods.belt: Chain Lightning: When a link connects, it also strikes the target with a lightning bolt from the sky that deals the same damage as Chain Lightning.

equipmentMods.trinket: Static Charge: Static charge will now stay for an additional 0.6 seconds, damaging more enemies and dealing an addition 5% per enemy inside Static Charge range.

equipmentMods.goblet: Arcane Apocalypse: After an explosion, spawns a black hole that damages enemies over time. The black hole deals 50% damage per tick. Each stack decreases tick time by 10%, resulting in more damage over time.
Arcane Totems: Your totems fire two additional arcane flames.
Lightning Plasma: Lightning Plasma stays for an additional 0.75 seconds and deals +55% damage.
Dragon Flame: The dragon stays for additional 2 seconds on the battlefield.

Arcane Orb: Orbs become Chaos orbs, dealing 40% increased damage. Chaos Orbs gain 15% increased damage for every additional orb. Chaos orbs have a 10% chance to cause an Arcane burst when returning to the player.

Lightning Totems: Totems will now summon two additional Lightning bolts.
